hero.title:
Product and
Material Tracking,
Traceability and
Sustainability
Platform
hero.description: is an end-to-end materials traceability and management platform that enables OEMs and value chain partners to track recycled content, carbon footprint, and regulatory compliance across every stage of production.

loader.wait: Please wait while we load our next gen platform

features.title: Platform Capabilities
features.subtitle: Comprehensive Sustainability Engine.
features.scroll: Scroll to explore all 12 platform capabilities →

tracking.title: Tracking & Traceability
tracking.desc: Real-time intelligence tracks every material, batch & transaction across your supply chain.

mapping.title: Dynamic Mapping
mapping.desc: Visualize your entire supply chain network from raw extraction to final assembly.

passport.title: Material Passport
passport.desc: Every product gets a digital twin containing its entire lifecycle history and provenance.

risk.title: Risk Intelligence
risk.desc: Predictive analytics identify supply chain disruptions before they cascade.

vault.title: Compliance Vault
vault.desc: Securely store all regulatory documentation in a tamper-proof, audit-ready ledger.

network.title: Supplier Network
network.desc: Onboard and manage thousands of suppliers with automated data verification.

sustainability.title: Sustainability Engine
sustainability.desc: Automate carbon accounting and ESG compliance with precision data protocols.

portal.title: Stakeholder Portal
portal.desc: Seamlessly share supply chain data with customers and regulatory bodies.

benchmarks.title: Industry Benchmarks
benchmarks.desc: Compare your sustainability performance against global competitors in real-time.

ai.title: AI Automation
ai.desc: Harness ML to extract and verify data from complex supply chain documents.

efficiency.title: Operational Efficiency
efficiency.desc: Streamline procurement and logistics with data-driven, automated workflows.

architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
architecture.desc: Built for enterprise-scale operations, handling millions of transactions safely.

traction.title: Live Telemetry
traction.subtitle: Real Time Numbers.
traction.scroll: Scroll to explore all 6 live metrics →

industries.label: Industries Covered
industries.desc: Automotive, HVAC, Steel, Plastic, Aluminium & Battery — all within one unified platform.

stakeholders.label: Stakeholders Onboarded
stakeholders.desc: Active organizations operating across the global value chain, all connected in real-time.

tracking.label: Tracking & Traceability
tracking.desc: Tonnes of material tracked end-to-end with full provenance & timestamped audit trails.

emissions.label: Verified Emissions
emissions.desc: Tonnes of GHG measured, validated & verified by our precision carbon intelligence layer.

circularity.label: Circularity Index
circularity.desc: Average circularity score across tracked material flows, above industry median by 2.3x.

compliance.label: Automated Compliance
compliance.desc: Regulatory reports auto-generated by AI for CBAM, EPR, IRA & global ESG frameworks.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.subtitle: AI-Powered Intelligence.
ai.scroll: Scroll to explore all 6 AI capabilities →

capture.title: Smart Data Capture
capture.desc: AI reads supplier emails and documents, eliminating the need for partners to log in. No portal, no training required.

risk.title: Predictive Risk Scoring
risk.desc: ML models continuously analyze supply chain signals to forecast disruptions before they impact operations.

compliance.title: Automated Compliance
compliance.desc: Regulatory-aware AI automatically generates audit-ready CBAM, EPR, and IRA reports without manual effort.

flow.title: Material Flow Optimization
flow.desc: AI recommends optimal recycled-to-virgin ratios, routing decisions, and inventory strategies at scale.

anomaly.title: Emission Anomaly Detection
anomaly.desc: Real-time AI monitoring flags irregularities in GHG data, ensuring data integrity and compliance trust.

carbon.title: Carbon Intelligence
carbon.desc: AI models fill data gaps to calculate granular Scope 3 emissions with high accuracy across all tiers.

precision.title: Deep Tier Precision
precision.desc: We don't just track Direct Suppliers. We trace the entire value chain all the way back to source extraction.

ai.title: Industrial Grade AI
ai.desc: Custom ML models built specifically for complex material data and industrial OEM supplier documents.

architecture.title: Global Architecture
architecture.desc: Nodes in every major industrial hub—Mumbai to San Francisco—ensuring zero latency at enterprise scale.

compliance.title: Compliance Ready
compliance.desc: Built-in frameworks for EU Battery Passport, CBAM, US Clean Air Act, and expanding global mandates.

integration.title: Seamless Integration
integration.desc: Connects with existing ERPs like SAP, Oracle, and Dynamics in minutes, not months. Zero rip-and-replace.

audit.title: Audit-Proof Proof
audit.desc: Tamper-proof traceability records that withstand the most rigorous regulatory and third-party audits.

footer.contactDesc: Reach out to discuss how MatNEXT can transform your supply chain operations.
footer.matnextDesc: Advanced product and material tracking, traceability & sustainability platform for the industrial value chain.
